content:
X, you have until Friday at midnight to complete any assignments you are missing or are incomplete. Mind the syllabus and which assignments weigh the most and go for those in order to improve your grade. If you need any assignments cleared in order for you to submit send me a list of those assignments in a single email.

Best,
Professor Padavano

—————————

X, I'm reaching out because you missed week one's class. You have two different class times to chose from: 11:30 am - 1:30 pm or 6:30 pm - 8:30 pm.

Please let me know which class you intend on attending!

Best, Professor Padavano

Student failed to attend week one's class. I reached out to the student via phone, KU email, and secondary email.
context: From document: Week 1 Retention Tracking — chunk 133 (chunk 133/133)
